div.span: To keep things tidy, not all navigational edges are shown.

div.div: The following usage scenarios should be covered (have a mental run-through, what is missing?):
3. change scoring system and have split fleets
6. create complex event with multiple parts (leaderboard groups) and regattas

The idea of the wizard is to allow the user to finish at any time, if he is satisfied with the level of detail. Sensible defaults should be used for all the following steps that are skipped. Steps should become increasingly irrelevant (exception: the last review step).
